prompt: Research the current state of local / on-device LLMs using YouTube videos. Build a NotebookLM notebook from the top videos on the topic, analyze where the videos agree and disagree, and write me up a briefing. Save it to my vault and include the sources with their view counts, channel names, and engagement ratios.

assertions.text: Found ~10 YouTube videos and created a NotebookLM notebook from them
Added the videos as notebook sources (notebook_id present in output/manifest)
Ran analysis grounded in the topic (not a generic summary) using the notebook
Saved a Markdown report to the vault under notebooklm/<topic>/
Showed the report content in chat, not just a 'saved to path' message
Report includes full YouTube metadata: view counts, channel names, and engagement ratios
